title: cyclobalanopsis lobbii
intro: Cyclobalanopsis lobbii, also known as Lobb's oak or Taiwan oak, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae. Traditionally, the plant's leaves, bark, and seeds have been used in herbal medicine, and it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The medicinal properties of Cyclobalanopsis lobbii have been associated with various health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves, bark, and seeds are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
